name: Web - HTTP Flood DDoS Detection
description: Detects HTTP flood DDoS attacks by identifying single IP addresses sending an abnormally high number of requests within a short time window. Also identifies distributed patterns with many IPs targeting the same endpoint.
search: index=web (sourcetype=nginx_access OR sourcetype=apache_access) | bucket _time span=1m | stats count as req_per_min, dc(uri) as unique_uris, values(method) as methods, values(status) as statuses by src_ip, host, _time | where req_per_min >= 300 | eval attack_type=case( req_per_min >= 1000, "Volumetric HTTP Flood", req_per_min >= 500, "Heavy HTTP Flood", req_per_min >= 300, "HTTP Flood") | eval severity=case( req_per_min >= 1000, "critical", req_per_min >= 500, "high", 1==1, "medium") | eval mitre="T1498.001" | sort -req_per_min | table _time, src_ip, host, req_per_min, unique_uris, attack_type, methods, statuses, severity, mitre
author: SOC Team
